he.text: The Supreme Lord said I imparted this imperishable yoga of ידע achieved by selfless action to Sūrya the presiding deity of the sun Sūrya taught it to his son Vaivasvata Manu who passed it on to his son Ikṣvāku

ar.text: The Supreme Lord said I imparted this imperishable yoga of المعرفة achieved by selfless action to Sūrya the presiding deity of the sun Sūrya taught it to his son Vaivasvata Manu who passed it on to his son Ikṣvāku

tr.text: The Supreme Lord said I imparted this imperishable yoga of bilgi achieved by selfless action to Sūrya the presiding deity of the sun Sūrya taught it to his son Vaivasvata Manu who passed it on to his son Ikṣvāku

sw.text: The Supreme Lord said I imparted this imperishable yoga of ujuzi achieved by selfless action to Sūrya the presiding deity of the sun Sūrya taught it to his son Vaivasvata Manu who passed it on to his son Ikṣvāku

he.text: O conqueror of the enemy thus the saintly kings such as Nimi Janaka and others learned this yoga which was passed down to them by disciplic succession But in the course of time this teaching has been lost

ar.text: O conqueror of the enemy thus the saintly kings such as Nimi Janaka and others learned this yoga which was passed down to them by disciplic succession But in the course of time this teaching has been lost

tr.text: O conqueror of the enemy thus the saintly kings such as Nimi Janaka and others learned this yoga which was passed down to them by disciplic succession But in the course of time this teaching has been lost

sw.text: O conqueror of the enemy thus the saintly kings such as Nimi Janaka and others learned this yoga which was passed down to them by disciplic succession But in the course of time this teaching has been lost

he.text: As you are my devotee and friend I now reveal to you this supreme secret—the eternal yoga

ar.text: As you are my devotee and friend I now reveal to you this supreme secret—the eternal yoga

tr.text: As you are my devotee and friend I now reveal to you this supreme secret—the eternal yoga

sw.text: As you are my devotee and friend I now reveal to you this supreme secret—the eternal yoga

he.text: Arjuna said Vivasvān the sun-god was born in ancient times long before You were Therefore how am I to consider that You previously gave these teachings to him

ar.text: Arjuna said Vivasvān the sun-god was born in ancient times long before You were Therefore how am I to consider that You previously gave these teachings to him

tr.text: Arjuna said Vivasvān the sun-god was born in ancient times long before You were Therefore how am I to consider that You previously gave these teachings to him

sw.text: Arjuna said Vivasvān the sun-god was born in ancient times long before You were Therefore how am I to consider that You previously gave these teachings to him

he.text: The Supreme Lord said O chastiser of the enemy both you and I have passed through many births I can remember all of them whereas you O Arjuna cannot

ar.text: The Supreme Lord said O chastiser of the enemy both you and I have passed through many births I can remember all of them whereas you O Arjuna cannot

tr.text: The Supreme Lord said O chastiser of the enemy both you and I have passed through many births I can remember all of them whereas you O Arjuna cannot

sw.text: The Supreme Lord said O chastiser of the enemy both you and I have passed through many births I can remember all of them whereas you O Arjuna cannot

he.text: Although My eternal form is transcendental to birth and death and I am the Lord of all beings I appear within the world in My divine nature by My sweet will extending My internal potency

ar.text: Although My eternal form is transcendental to birth and death and I am the Lord of all beings I appear within the world in My divine nature by My sweet will extending My internal potency

tr.text: Although My eternal form is transcendental to birth and death and I am the Lord of all beings I appear within the world in My divine nature by My sweet will extending My internal potency

sw.text: Although My eternal form is transcendental to birth and death and I am the Lord of all beings I appear within the world in My divine nature by My sweet will extending My internal potency

he.text: O Bhārata whenever there is a decline of religion and an uprising of irreligion I personally make My advent

ar.text: O Bhārata whenever there is a decline of religion and an uprising of irreligion I personally make My advent

tr.text: O Bhārata whenever there is a decline of religion and an uprising of irreligion I personally make My advent

sw.text: O Bhārata whenever there is a decline of religion and an uprising of irreligion I personally make My advent

he.text: I appear age after age to deliver the saintly devotees vanquish the miscreants and firmly establish true religion

ar.text: I appear age after age to deliver the saintly devotees vanquish the miscreants and firmly establish true religion

tr.text: I appear age after age to deliver the saintly devotees vanquish the miscreants and firmly establish true religion

sw.text: I appear age after age to deliver the saintly devotees vanquish the miscreants and firmly establish true religion

he.text: O Arjuna one who comes to know thus the truth of My Pastimes of divine birth and activities does not undergo rebirth After giving up this body he attains Me My grace is revealed to him as My personal transcendental joyful potency hlādinī-śakti His heart is melted in divine love and he attains My eternal devotional service

ar.text: O Arjuna one who comes to know thus the truth of My Pastimes of divine birth and activities does not undergo rebirth After giving up this body he attains Me My grace is revealed to him as My personal transcendental joyful potency hlādinī-śakti His heart is melted in divine love and he attains My eternal devotional service

tr.text: O Arjuna one who comes to know thus the truth of My Pastimes of divine birth and activities does not undergo rebirth After giving up this body he attains Me My grace is revealed to him as My personal transcendental joyful potency hlādinī-śakti His heart is melted in divine love and he attains My eternal devotional service

sw.text: O Arjuna one who comes to know thus the truth of My Pastimes of divine birth and activities does not undergo rebirth After giving up this body he attains Me My grace is revealed to him as My personal transcendental joyful potency hlādinī-śakti His heart is melted in divine love and he attains My eternal devotional service

he.text: Free from attachment fear and anger many persons have taken shelter in Me absorbing their hearts in My services hearing chanting and remembering Purified by ידע and the fire of ordeal in My service they attained divine love for Me

ar.text: Free from attachment fear and anger many persons have taken shelter in Me absorbing their hearts in My services hearing chanting and remembering Purified by المعرفة and the fire of ordeal in My service they attained divine love for Me

tr.text: Free from attachment fear and anger many persons have taken shelter in Me absorbing their hearts in My services hearing chanting and remembering Purified by bilgi and the fire of ordeal in My service they attained divine love for Me

sw.text: Free from attachment fear and anger many persons have taken shelter in Me absorbing their hearts in My services hearing chanting and remembering Purified by ujuzi and the fire of ordeal in My service they attained divine love for Me

he.text: Howsoever people surrender to Me I accordingly reward them Being the ultimate goal of all paths I am the objective to be attained by all O Pārtha all men follow My various paths

ar.text: Howsoever people surrender to Me I accordingly reward them Being the ultimate goal of all paths I am the objective to be attained by all O Pārtha all men follow My various paths

tr.text: Howsoever people surrender to Me I accordingly reward them Being the ultimate goal of all paths I am the objective to be attained by all O Pārtha all men follow My various paths

sw.text: Howsoever people surrender to Me I accordingly reward them Being the ultimate goal of all paths I am the objective to be attained by all O Pārtha all men follow My various paths

he.text: Persons who desire the fruit of their actions worship the gods since in the human plane actions swiftly bear fruit

ar.text: Persons who desire the fruit of their actions worship the gods since in the human plane actions swiftly bear fruit

tr.text: Persons who desire the fruit of their actions worship the gods since in the human plane actions swiftly bear fruit

sw.text: Persons who desire the fruit of their actions worship the gods since in the human plane actions swiftly bear fruit

he.text: The four social divisions classified according to the material modes of nature and corresponding activities are made manifest by Me Although I am the doer of this know Me to be the non-doer and unchangable

ar.text: The four social divisions classified according to the material modes of nature and corresponding activities are made manifest by Me Although I am the doer of this know Me to be the non-doer and unchangable

tr.text: The four social divisions classified according to the material modes of nature and corresponding activities are made manifest by Me Although I am the doer of this know Me to be the non-doer and unchangable

sw.text: The four social divisions classified according to the material modes of nature and corresponding activities are made manifest by Me Although I am the doer of this know Me to be the non-doer and unchangable

he.text: I am never implicated by action nor do I desire the fruits of action One who knows Me thus as the Supreme Lord transcendental to worldly action is never bound by action

ar.text: I am never implicated by action nor do I desire the fruits of action One who knows Me thus as the Supreme Lord transcendental to worldly action is never bound by action

tr.text: I am never implicated by action nor do I desire the fruits of action One who knows Me thus as the Supreme Lord transcendental to worldly action is never bound by action

sw.text: I am never implicated by action nor do I desire the fruits of action One who knows Me thus as the Supreme Lord transcendental to worldly action is never bound by action

he.text: Knowing this basic principle seekers of liberation in previous times renounced all fruitive work and performed their duties as a selfless offering to Me Likewise you should adopt this yoga of selfless action as did the great saintly persons of yore

ar.text: Knowing this basic principle seekers of liberation in previous times renounced all fruitive work and performed their duties as a selfless offering to Me Likewise you should adopt this yoga of selfless action as did the great saintly persons of yore

tr.text: Knowing this basic principle seekers of liberation in previous times renounced all fruitive work and performed their duties as a selfless offering to Me Likewise you should adopt this yoga of selfless action as did the great saintly persons of yore

sw.text: Knowing this basic principle seekers of liberation in previous times renounced all fruitive work and performed their duties as a selfless offering to Me Likewise you should adopt this yoga of selfless action as did the great saintly persons of yore

he.text: What is action What is inaction Even the learned have difficulty understanding this Hence I shall enlighten you in this matter knowing which you will liberated from inauspiciousness

ar.text: What is action What is inaction Even the learned have difficulty understanding this Hence I shall enlighten you in this matter knowing which you will liberated from inauspiciousness

tr.text: What is action What is inaction Even the learned have difficulty understanding this Hence I shall enlighten you in this matter knowing which you will liberated from inauspiciousness

sw.text: What is action What is inaction Even the learned have difficulty understanding this Hence I shall enlighten you in this matter knowing which you will liberated from inauspiciousness

he.text: The true nature of action is difficult to comprehend One should understand prescribed action prohibited action and inaction

ar.text: The true nature of action is difficult to comprehend One should understand prescribed action prohibited action and inaction

tr.text: The true nature of action is difficult to comprehend One should understand prescribed action prohibited action and inaction

sw.text: The true nature of action is difficult to comprehend One should understand prescribed action prohibited action and inaction

he.text: One who sees action within inaction and inaction within action is wise among men He is a yogī and a performer of all actions

ar.text: One who sees action within inaction and inaction within action is wise among men He is a yogī and a performer of all actions

tr.text: One who sees action within inaction and inaction within action is wise among men He is a yogī and a performer of all actions

sw.text: One who sees action within inaction and inaction within action is wise among men He is a yogī and a performer of all actions

he.text: One whose every action is without fruitive desire and who burns all actions in the fire of ידע is described by the wise as learned

ar.text: One whose every action is without fruitive desire and who burns all actions in the fire of المعرفة is described by the wise as learned

tr.text: One whose every action is without fruitive desire and who burns all actions in the fire of bilgi is described by the wise as learned

sw.text: One whose every action is without fruitive desire and who burns all actions in the fire of ujuzi is described by the wise as learned

he.text: Such a person giving up attachment to the fruits of action fully content in the eternal bliss within and free from mundane dependence though fully active does nothing at all

ar.text: Such a person giving up attachment to the fruits of action fully content in the eternal bliss within and free from mundane dependence though fully active does nothing at all

tr.text: Such a person giving up attachment to the fruits of action fully content in the eternal bliss within and free from mundane dependence though fully active does nothing at all

sw.text: Such a person giving up attachment to the fruits of action fully content in the eternal bliss within and free from mundane dependence though fully active does nothing at all

he.text: Desireless controlling mind and body by the intelligence and renouncing all possessiveness and acquisition no sinful or pious reaction is incurred by such a person who may act to acquire mundane objects merely for his bodily sustenance

ar.text: Desireless controlling mind and body by the intelligence and renouncing all possessiveness and acquisition no sinful or pious reaction is incurred by such a person who may act to acquire mundane objects merely for his bodily sustenance

tr.text: Desireless controlling mind and body by the intelligence and renouncing all possessiveness and acquisition no sinful or pious reaction is incurred by such a person who may act to acquire mundane objects merely for his bodily sustenance

sw.text: Desireless controlling mind and body by the intelligence and renouncing all possessiveness and acquisition no sinful or pious reaction is incurred by such a person who may act to acquire mundane objects merely for his bodily sustenance

he.text: Content with whatever is readily available and unaffected by dualities of pleasure and pain attraction and aversion such a person has no envy He is equipoised neither elated nor dejected in success or failure Though active he is not bound by any action

ar.text: Content with whatever is readily available and unaffected by dualities of pleasure and pain attraction and aversion such a person has no envy He is equipoised neither elated nor dejected in success or failure Though active he is not bound by any action

tr.text: Content with whatever is readily available and unaffected by dualities of pleasure and pain attraction and aversion such a person has no envy He is equipoised neither elated nor dejected in success or failure Though active he is not bound by any action

sw.text: Content with whatever is readily available and unaffected by dualities of pleasure and pain attraction and aversion such a person has no envy He is equipoised neither elated nor dejected in success or failure Though active he is not bound by any action

he.text: For one who is detached enlightened and liberated all his actions performed in the spirit of sacrifice are perfectly dissipated

ar.text: For one who is detached enlightened and liberated all his actions performed in the spirit of sacrifice are perfectly dissipated

tr.text: For one who is detached enlightened and liberated all his actions performed in the spirit of sacrifice are perfectly dissipated

sw.text: For one who is detached enlightened and liberated all his actions performed in the spirit of sacrifice are perfectly dissipated

he.text: The ladle is Brahma the oblation is Brahma offered by Brahma into the fire of Brahma One whose consciousness is fully absorbed in Brahma action certainly attains to Brahma the Absolute

ar.text: The ladle is Brahma the oblation is Brahma offered by Brahma into the fire of Brahma One whose consciousness is fully absorbed in Brahma action certainly attains to Brahma the Absolute

tr.text: The ladle is Brahma the oblation is Brahma offered by Brahma into the fire of Brahma One whose consciousness is fully absorbed in Brahma action certainly attains to Brahma the Absolute

sw.text: The ladle is Brahma the oblation is Brahma offered by Brahma into the fire of Brahma One whose consciousness is fully absorbed in Brahma action certainly attains to Brahma the Absolute

he.text: Some yogīs offer sacrifices to the demigods and others offer the self into the fire of Brahma by vibrating the praṇava mantra Om

ar.text: Some yogīs offer sacrifices to the demigods and others offer the self into the fire of Brahma by vibrating the praṇava mantra Om

tr.text: Some yogīs offer sacrifices to the demigods and others offer the self into the fire of Brahma by vibrating the praṇava mantra Om

sw.text: Some yogīs offer sacrifices to the demigods and others offer the self into the fire of Brahma by vibrating the praṇava mantra Om

he.text: Some offer their senses of hearing touching seeing tasting and smelling into the fires of self-control yet others offer the sense objects of sound touch form taste and smell into the fire of the senses

ar.text: Some offer their senses of hearing touching seeing tasting and smelling into the fires of self-control yet others offer the sense objects of sound touch form taste and smell into the fire of the senses

tr.text: Some offer their senses of hearing touching seeing tasting and smelling into the fires of self-control yet others offer the sense objects of sound touch form taste and smell into the fire of the senses

sw.text: Some offer their senses of hearing touching seeing tasting and smelling into the fires of self-control yet others offer the sense objects of sound touch form taste and smell into the fire of the senses

he.text: Again there are the yogīs who offer all the functions of the senses and the life forces into the yogic fire of self-purification ignited by ידע

ar.text: Again there are the yogīs who offer all the functions of the senses and the life forces into the yogic fire of self-purification ignited by المعرفة

tr.text: Again there are the yogīs who offer all the functions of the senses and the life forces into the yogic fire of self-purification ignited by bilgi

sw.text: Again there are the yogīs who offer all the functions of the senses and the life forces into the yogic fire of self-purification ignited by ujuzi

he.text: Sincere in their practices and faithful to their vows some persons sacrifice their possessions some undergo strict penances as a sacrifice some practise the eightfold mystic yoga as a sacrifice and yet others perform ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ by singing and introspectively studying the Vedas

ar.text: Sincere in their practices and faithful to their vows some persons sacrifice their possessions some undergo strict penances as a sacrifice some practise the eightfold mystic yoga as a sacrifice and yet others perform ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ by singing and introspectively studying the Vedas

tr.text: Sincere in their practices and faithful to their vows some persons sacrifice their possessions some undergo strict penances as a sacrifice some practise the eightfold mystic yoga as a sacrifice and yet others perform ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ by singing and introspectively studying the Vedas

sw.text: Sincere in their practices and faithful to their vows some persons sacrifice their possessions some undergo strict penances as a sacrifice some practise the eightfold mystic yoga as a sacrifice and yet others perform ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ by singing and introspectively studying the Vedas

he.text: Others practise breath-control Closing the right nostril and inhaling through the left they bring the ascending air into union with the descending closing the left nostril and exhaling through the right they similarly offer the descending air into the ascending then closing both nostrils they check both ascending and descending airs Yet other practitioners of sense-control offer all the senses into the life-airs by reducing their food intake

ar.text: Others practise breath-control Closing the right nostril and inhaling through the left they bring the ascending air into union with the descending closing the left nostril and exhaling through the right they similarly offer the descending air into the ascending then closing both nostrils they check both ascending and descending airs Yet other practitioners of sense-control offer all the senses into the life-airs by reducing their food intake

tr.text: Others practise breath-control Closing the right nostril and inhaling through the left they bring the ascending air into union with the descending closing the left nostril and exhaling through the right they similarly offer the descending air into the ascending then closing both nostrils they check both ascending and descending airs Yet other practitioners of sense-control offer all the senses into the life-airs by reducing their food intake

sw.text: Others practise breath-control Closing the right nostril and inhaling through the left they bring the ascending air into union with the descending closing the left nostril and exhaling through the right they similarly offer the descending air into the ascending then closing both nostrils they check both ascending and descending airs Yet other practitioners of sense-control offer all the senses into the life-airs by reducing their food intake

he.text: All these persons are knowers of sacrifice purified by sacrifice Enjoying the nectarean remnants of sacrifice they attain to the eternal plane of the Absolute

ar.text: All these persons are knowers of sacrifice purified by sacrifice Enjoying the nectarean remnants of sacrifice they attain to the eternal plane of the Absolute

tr.text: All these persons are knowers of sacrifice purified by sacrifice Enjoying the nectarean remnants of sacrifice they attain to the eternal plane of the Absolute

sw.text: All these persons are knowers of sacrifice purified by sacrifice Enjoying the nectarean remnants of sacrifice they attain to the eternal plane of the Absolute

he.text: O Arjuna foremost of the Kurus without sacrifice one cannot attain fulfillment in this world to say nothing of the next

ar.text: O Arjuna foremost of the Kurus without sacrifice one cannot attain fulfillment in this world to say nothing of the next

tr.text: O Arjuna foremost of the Kurus without sacrifice one cannot attain fulfillment in this world to say nothing of the next

sw.text: O Arjuna foremost of the Kurus without sacrifice one cannot attain fulfillment in this world to say nothing of the next

he.text: Thus many types of sacrifice are described in the Vedas and allied scriptures Know that they are all accomplished through action of thought word and deed Knowing this you will be liberated from the bondage of action

ar.text: Thus many types of sacrifice are described in the Vedas and allied scriptures Know that they are all accomplished through action of thought word and deed Knowing this you will be liberated from the bondage of action

tr.text: Thus many types of sacrifice are described in the Vedas and allied scriptures Know that they are all accomplished through action of thought word and deed Knowing this you will be liberated from the bondage of action

sw.text: Thus many types of sacrifice are described in the Vedas and allied scriptures Know that they are all accomplished through action of thought word and deed Knowing this you will be liberated from the bondage of action

he.text: O Arjuna subduer of the enemy ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ is superior to the sacrifice of material objects because the perfection of all action including its fruit is its culmination in ידע

ar.text: O Arjuna subduer of the enemy ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ is superior to the sacrifice of material objects because the perfection of all action including its fruit is its culmination in المعرفة

tr.text: O Arjuna subduer of the enemy ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ is superior to the sacrifice of material objects because the perfection of all action including its fruit is its culmination in bilgi

sw.text: O Arjuna subduer of the enemy ‘knowledge-sacrifice’ is superior to the sacrifice of material objects because the perfection of all action including its fruit is its culmination in ujuzi

he.text: You will be able to attain ידע by satisfying the divine master with submission relevant inquiry and sincere service The enlightened souls who are learned in scriptural ידע and endowed with direct realisation of the Supreme Absolute Truth will impart divine ידע to you

ar.text: You will be able to attain المعرفة by satisfying the divine master with submission relevant inquiry and sincere service The enlightened souls who are learned in scriptural المعرفة and endowed with direct realisation of the Supreme Absolute Truth will impart divine المعرفة to you

tr.text: You will be able to attain bilgi by satisfying the divine master with submission relevant inquiry and sincere service The enlightened souls who are learned in scriptural bilgi and endowed with direct realisation of the Supreme Absolute Truth will impart divine bilgi to you

sw.text: You will be able to attain ujuzi by satisfying the divine master with submission relevant inquiry and sincere service The enlightened souls who are learned in scriptural ujuzi and endowed with direct realisation of the Supreme Absolute Truth will impart divine ujuzi to you

he.text: O Pāṇḍava when you are enlightened by this ידע of the reality you will no longer be subject to your present illusion You will see the one spiritual nature in all species of life from highest to lowest and that all are situated within Me

ar.text: O Pāṇḍava when you are enlightened by this المعرفة of the reality you will no longer be subject to your present illusion You will see the one spiritual nature in all species of life from highest to lowest and that all are situated within Me

tr.text: O Pāṇḍava when you are enlightened by this bilgi of the reality you will no longer be subject to your present illusion You will see the one spiritual nature in all species of life from highest to lowest and that all are situated within Me

sw.text: O Pāṇḍava when you are enlightened by this ujuzi of the reality you will no longer be subject to your present illusion You will see the one spiritual nature in all species of life from highest to lowest and that all are situated within Me

he.text: Even if you are the most sinful of all sinners you will cross the ocean of sins by the boat of ידע

ar.text: Even if you are the most sinful of all sinners you will cross the ocean of sins by the boat of المعرفة

tr.text: Even if you are the most sinful of all sinners you will cross the ocean of sins by the boat of bilgi

sw.text: Even if you are the most sinful of all sinners you will cross the ocean of sins by the boat of ujuzi

he.text: As a blazing fire renders wood to ashes O Arjuna the fire of ידע burns up all worldly actions

ar.text: As a blazing fire renders wood to ashes O Arjuna the fire of المعرفة burns up all worldly actions

tr.text: As a blazing fire renders wood to ashes O Arjuna the fire of bilgi burns up all worldly actions

sw.text: As a blazing fire renders wood to ashes O Arjuna the fire of ujuzi burns up all worldly actions

he.text: In this world there is nothing as pure as ידע Eventually a person who has achieved perfection in the yoga of selfless action naturally realises this ידע within his heart

ar.text: In this world there is nothing as pure as المعرفة Eventually a person who has achieved perfection in the yoga of selfless action naturally realises this المعرفة within his heart

tr.text: In this world there is nothing as pure as bilgi Eventually a person who has achieved perfection in the yoga of selfless action naturally realises this bilgi within his heart

sw.text: In this world there is nothing as pure as ujuzi Eventually a person who has achieved perfection in the yoga of selfless action naturally realises this ujuzi within his heart

he.text: It is the devoted faithful and sense-controlled person who attains ידע Achieving enlightenment such a person soon attains the supreme שלום

ar.text: It is the devoted faithful and sense-controlled person who attains المعرفة Achieving enlightenment such a person soon attains the supreme السلام

tr.text: It is the devoted faithful and sense-controlled person who attains bilgi Achieving enlightenment such a person soon attains the supreme huzur

sw.text: It is the devoted faithful and sense-controlled person who attains ujuzi Achieving enlightenment such a person soon attains the supreme amani

he.text: The ignorant faithless and doubting person is doomed to misfortune For the doubting soul there can be אושר neither in this life nor the next

ar.text: The ignorant faithless and doubting person is doomed to misfortune For the doubting soul there can be السعادة neither in this life nor the next

tr.text: The ignorant faithless and doubting person is doomed to misfortune For the doubting soul there can be mutluluk neither in this life nor the next

sw.text: The ignorant faithless and doubting person is doomed to misfortune For the doubting soul there can be furaha neither in this life nor the next

he.text: O Dhanañjaya renouncing all worldly actions by following the path of selfless action one who severs all his doubts by ידע and realises his internal divine nature can never be bound by action

ar.text: O Dhanañjaya renouncing all worldly actions by following the path of selfless action one who severs all his doubts by المعرفة and realises his internal divine nature can never be bound by action

tr.text: O Dhanañjaya renouncing all worldly actions by following the path of selfless action one who severs all his doubts by bilgi and realises his internal divine nature can never be bound by action

sw.text: O Dhanañjaya renouncing all worldly actions by following the path of selfless action one who severs all his doubts by ujuzi and realises his internal divine nature can never be bound by action

he.text: Therefore O Bhārat with the sword of ידע slash to shreds all these doubts in your heart which are born of ignorance Take refuge in selfless action and arise for battle

ar.text: Therefore O Bhārat with the sword of المعرفة slash to shreds all these doubts in your heart which are born of ignorance Take refuge in selfless action and arise for battle

tr.text: Therefore O Bhārat with the sword of bilgi slash to shreds all these doubts in your heart which are born of ignorance Take refuge in selfless action and arise for battle

sw.text: Therefore O Bhārat with the sword of ujuzi slash to shreds all these doubts in your heart which are born of ignorance Take refuge in selfless action and arise for battle
